User Story: As a student, I want to login via university ID so I can access my profile.
Comments: Core authentication feature; university ID validation required

User Story: As a teacher, I want to view a real-time list of present students.
Comments: Dashboard requires live data binding; WebSocket integration needed

User Story: As a system, I want to detect if a student is within 10m of the classroom.
Comments: Core geo-fencing logic; requires location permission handling; battery optimization needed

User Story: As a student, I want a notification when my attendance is marked.
Comments: Push notification integration; local storage of notification history

User Story: As an admin, I want to manually override attendance for technical errors.
Comments: Admin dashboard feature; audit trail logging required

User Story: As a developer, I want to set up CI/CD pipeline for automated deployment.
Comments: GitHub Actions or similar; automated testing on each commit

User Story: As a student, I want the app to work offline with sync when connection returns.
Comments: Local database setup; conflict resolution for sync

User Story: As a teacher, I want to download attendance reports in CSV format.
Comments: Report generation; export functionality

User Story: As a system, I want to validate classroom location before attendance is marked.
Comments: Geofence accuracy testing; false positive prevention

User Story: As an admin, I want to configure geo-fence radius per classroom.
Comments: Admin configuration interface

User Story: As a student, I want biometric (Face ID) verification during attendance marking.
Comments: New requirement; integrate face recognition API; requires privacy compliance

User Story: As a system, I want to detect and prevent proxy attendance via biometric matching.
Comments: Liveness detection; anti-spoofing measures

User Story: As an admin, I want to manage biometric profiles for all students.
Comments: Bulk enrollment; re-enrollment process

User Story: As a student, I want to manage my biometric profile (update/delete).
Comments: Privacy controls; GDPR compliance

User Story: As a system, I want to encrypt and securely store facial recognition data.
Comments: Security compliance; encryption standards

User Story: As a teacher, I want to see which students require manual verification.
Comments: Biometric failure fallback; manual override logging

User Story: As a developer, I want integration tests between geo-fencing and biometrics.
Comments: End-to-end testing; performance testing

User Story: As an admin, I want an audit log of all biometric authentication attempts.
Comments: Compliance logging; FERPA requirements

User Story: As a student, I want the option to register my face without classroom visit.
Comments: Pre-registration feature; convenience enhancement

User Story: As a system, I want to handle biometric API failures gracefully.
Comments: Fallback to geo-fencing only; error messaging
